mnemonics.title: Secure SDLC Phases
mnemonics.content: RDTVMO: Requirements, Design, Testing, Verification, Maintenance, Operations

acronyms.usage: Used to analyze source code for vulnerabilities

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a conveyor belt with security checkpoints at each phase (requirements to deployment)

analogies.analogy: Like building a house with security inspectors at every construction stage, not just final inspection
